title: ConfigMaps & Secrets: Injecting configuration
scenario: A `web` pod references a ConfigMap named `app-config` (for the `APP_ENV` env var) and a Secret named `app-secret` (for `DB_PASSWORD`). Both are missing — the pod stays in a `ContainerCreating` loop because the volume mounts can't resolve. Create the ConfigMap and Secret so the pod can start.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: app-config
  namespace: default
data:
  APP_ENVIRONMENT: staging
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: app-secret
  namespace: default
type: Opaque
data:
  db_password: c2VjcmV0MTIz

hints.text: Apply both the ConfigMap and the Secret together — you can put them in one YAML file separated by `---`.
The ConfigMap key must be exactly `APP_ENV` and the Secret key must be exactly `password` — the pod's env references are case-sensitive.
Once both resources exist, re-apply the starter YAML. The pod should transition from Pending → Running within a few ticks.

solution:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: app-config
  namespace: default
data:
  APP_ENV: production
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: app-secret
  namespace: default
type: Opaque
data:
  password: c2VjcmV0MTIz
